name: geo-measurement
description: GEO Measurement System: measures and improves how a company is represented by LLMs in the prompts its buyers use (for B2B startups). Surfaces under test via OpenRouter; deterministic local JSONL compute layer; LLM judgment agents; optional Notion gates. By Lobo Growth.
author: Patrick Kemp <patrick@lobogrowth.com> (https://lobogrowth.com)
